name: generic_visual_focus
description: Creates a layout-preserving focus artifact for left/right comparison by emphasizing visually salient regions and candidate object extents in natural images without relying on object-specific detectors. Robustly converts PIL images, numpy arrays, grayscale, RGBA, and unusual intermediate values into concrete numpy image arrays before OpenCV operations, and always saves a real artifact under artifacts/ for valid inputs.
applicability_conditions: Creates a layout-preserving focus artifact for left/right comparison by emphasizing visually salient regions and candidate object extents in natural images without relying on object-specific detectors. Robustly converts PIL images, numpy arrays, grayscale, RGBA, and unusual intermediate values into concrete numpy image arrays before OpenCV operations, and always saves a real artifact under artifacts/ for valid inputs.
